response.step_by_step_log:
1. Analyzed the video and identified two distinct vocal song segments.
2. For the first song, identified the title "Mitsugetsu Un Deux Trois" via lyrics and visual cues ("Un Deux Trois" in the lyrics and Japanese title found). Confirmed the original artist as DATEKEN.
3. For the second song, identified the title "Sayonara no Mae ni" through lyric search. Confirmed the original artist as AAA.
4. Performed web searches for both songs to find Japanese lyrics and English translations using: "[Song Title] lyrics Japanese and English".
5. Compiled the data into the requested JSON format.
response.global_summary: A 3-song medley performance by virtual performers. The video includes "Mitsugetsu Un Deux Trois" (originally by DATEKEN) and "Sayonara no Mae ni" (originally by AAA). Note: The first song segment starting at 00:00 appears to be part of the "Mitsugetsu Un Deux Trois" performance, despite the visual title appearing later. The video concludes with a short dialogue interval.

scenes.description: Virtual characters perform a choreographed dance and sing. The song "Mitsugetsu Un Deux Trois" begins.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Everyone has gone. In our very own town,
The mechanized clock
Notifies us of night's arrival.
The twilight dyes
The sky the color of wine,
And invites us inexperienced
Two toward the stage.

"One, two, three" -
I gently draw near to you.
The secret love hidden
In our kiss,
"One, two, three" -
I'll weave this honeymoon.
So that the sweet
Love won't fade away.

I'll cast a love spell
On you.
"One, two, three" -
I gently draw near to you.
The secret love hidden
In our kiss.
"One, two, three" -
I'll weave this honeymoon.
So that the sweet
Love won't fade away.

scenes.description: Virtual characters perform a duet. The song "Sayonara no Mae ni" starts.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
最後のページに結末はあるように
二人のこの日々も終わる時が来るのかな
揺れる気持ちを胸の奥に秘めたまま
誤魔化すように抱きしめたりキスをしたね

震える指先で 愛を誓い合ったね
それなのに あなたの名前が消えない

さよならの前に あなたを知りたい
全部 あなたの全てを知りたい
もう抱きしめられないまま
もう伝えられないなら
戻りたい あの時の二人
Take me free
この歌はあなたに歌った歌
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Just as there is a conclusion on the last page,
I wonder if the time will come when these days of ours will end too?
I kept my wavering feelings hidden deep in my heart,
And as if to deceive them, we held each other and kissed, didn't we?

We made a vow of love, didn't we, with these trembling fingertips,
But even so, your name has disappeared.

Before the goodbye, I want to know you,
I want to know everything about you,
Before I can't hold you anymore,
Before I can't say it anymore.
I want to go back to that time,
Take me free.
This song is the one I sang for you.
